caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses is singing into a microphone, positioned in front of a background of light-brown horizontal slats. He is wearing a white collared shirt under a dark blue vest adorned with floral embroidery and a red and white patterned lanyard. He holds a light-colored acoustic guitar, of which only the top portion is visible. A black microphone stand extends from the left toward his face. The text "ORCA" is displayed in white uppercase letters on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expressions shift slightly as he sings, and his mouth opens and closes. The camera remains static, capturing a medium close-up of the performer throughout the duration of the clip.
